title: Craft End Portal
description: This mod allows you to craft the Nether portal block, which is normally inaccessible in survival mode. Perfect for creative maps, tech packs, or unique builds.
body:
# 🔥 Craftable Nether Portal Block – Minecraft Mod
**🧱 Main Feature:** This mod adds a crafting recipe for the Nether portal block, which is normally inaccessible in survival mode. Players can now place active portals in their builds without having to use the usual activation methods.

### 🎨 Creative Uses:
- Create immersive environments
- Add spectacular visual effects
- Integrate unique gameplay mechanics
- An ideal tool for map makers, modders, and Nether architecture enthusiasts

### ⚖️ Balance and Gameplay:
- Recipe designed to maintain game balance
- Does not alter the functionality of portals
- Allows precise placement like any other block

Why Use It? A simple addition that opens up a world of possibilities for Minecraft creators and builders.
